creator: outerrimlogging@gmail.com
text:
I had the same problem recently setting up  a 6.3 system. I didn't
think to look at the Xorg log files since I'm fairly new to bsd and
Linux, but found this report in my search on freebsd. I configured the
mouse via the /etc/rc.conf file and everything worked fine. I since
reloaded Ubuntu on that box, but will be building a server in the next
few months with freebsd 7.0 and will have a chance to test this again.

Hope this helps as I'm trying to learn my way around the etiquette of
making bug reports and asking for help.
